rulings.Case Title: BRUCE WALL et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, August 28, 2009, line 1, DEFENDANT CHAMPION INDUSTRIAL CONTRACTORS, INC. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. 1) Deny motion for summary judgment; 2) Deny Motion for Summary Adjudication Negligence cause of action. Defendant fails to shift burden of Duty Issue; 3)Grant Motion for summary adjudication on strict liability cause of action. Defendant shifts burden. Responses to Defendant's Special Interrogatories; Defendant contractor not involved in manufacturing or marketing asbestos products; 4) Grant motion for summary adjudication on false representation and punitives conceded by Plaintiff; 5) Deny as to loss of consortium. Plaintiff objections sustained; Champion Declaration stricken. =(302/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PCAM, LLC DBA PARKING COMPANY OF AMERICA VS. HOTEL AIRPORT SHUTTLE.COM, LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, August 28, 2009, line 8, PLAINTIFF PCAM, LLC MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/OR MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. Deny Motion for summary judgment and motion for summary adjudication. Triable issue of fact whether failure to obtain written assignments with Marriott & Hyatt (see Bauer declaration - told by Plaintiff vice president and managers to stand down the written approvals; whether breach material. As Plaintiff took providing services to Marriott and Hyatt, receiving payment; whether liquidated damages provision must be reformed; whether plaintiff breached profit sharing provision. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order, pursuant to CCP section 437c(g).) =(302/REQ)
